raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1475 allows Regional Transportation Authorities to utilize an innovative method for transportation projects.",
    "The project model created under AB 1475 is designed to save costs and connect regional transportation hubs.",
    "Existing law does not authorize Regional Transportation Authorities to utilize the Construction Manager/General Contractor project delivery method.",
    "The Construction Manager/General Contractor project delivery method allows for early collaboration between project designers/engineers and general contractors.",
    "The Construction Manager/General Contractor delivery method is stated to be a streamlined and cost-effective approach to project execution.",
    "The Caltrans 2017-18 Efficiency Report cited a savings of $44.5 million by using the Construction Manager/General Contractor delivery process."
  ]
}
```
